subcodes.first_line: O trusted one of 'Abdu'l-Bahá, thy letter dated 8 Ramaḍán 1325 was received and perused [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امین عبدالبهاء نامه شما که بتاریخ هشتم رمضان ۳۲۵ مرقوم نموده بودید ملاحظه گردید
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @growth of the Cause, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @poems and quotation from poetry
